summary: Iteration 58 Testing - All new features verified: (1) Custom Date Range Picker on Overall Dashboard working - 'Custom Range' option in dropdown triggers calendar popover with dual-month date picker, backend supports period=custom with custom_start/custom_end params. (2) Mentor Agent filter on MentorCRMPage.jsx implemented at line 497-504 with data-testid='filter-mentor-agent-trigger'. (3) Sales agent closings API returns agents sorted by revenue descending. (4) Pipeline revenue API returns enrolled stage with correct total. Backend APIs all passing, frontend code verified via grep.

minor.issue: External preview URL returning 502 intermittently, but localhost:8001 working fine

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings?limit=3 returns agents sorted by revenue desc (Aleesha: 155007, Neha: 57934, Shanif: 50499)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/pipeline-revenue returns enrolled stage with total_value: 960042
Backend: GET /api/users?role=mentor returns 6 mentors for filter dropdown
Backend: GET /api/students?mentor_id={id} correctly filters students by mentor
Frontend: BirdsEyeDashboard.jsx has PERIOD_OPTIONS with 'custom' value at line 42
Frontend: BirdsEyeDashboard.jsx custom date picker with Calendar+Popover at lines 174-199
Frontend: MentorCRMPage.jsx has filterMentorAgent state at line 265
Frontend: MentorCRMPage.jsx has filter dropdown at lines 497-504 with data-testid='filter-mentor-agent-trigger'
Frontend: SalesCRMPage.jsx has Team and Agent filter dropdowns at lines 824-842
Frontend: CustomerServicePage.jsx has CS Agent filter at lines 639-646
Frontend: Dashboard period filter shows 'Custom Range' option and opens calendar popover
Frontend: KPI cards show 'ACADEMICS REVENUE' (correctly renamed from Mentor)
Frontend: Revenue Bifurcation chart shows drill-down hint 'Click Sales to drill into teams'
critical_code_review_comments: BirdsEyeDashboard.jsx: Custom date range picker implemented correctly using react-day-picker Calendar with mode='range' and Popover for positioning (lines 174-199)
MentorCRMPage.jsx: Mentor agent filter implemented at lines 497-504, fetches mentors via /api/users?role=mentor, filters students via mentor_id param
Server.py: _get_date_range() at line 7499-7504 handles period='custom' with custom_start/custom_end parameters
Server.py: sales-agent-closings endpoint sorts by revenue descending (verified via test results)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Code verified, Dashboard features confirmed via Playwright)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: (1) Custom date range picker on dashboard at /dashboard - select 'Custom Range' from period dropdown, calendar opens to pick dates. (2) Mentor agent filter on /academics page - super_admin/academic_master sees dropdown at lines 497-504. (3) Sales agent closings sorted by revenue desc. (4) Pipeline revenue shows enrolled stage total correctly. External preview URL was intermittently returning 502, but all API tests passed via localhost:8001.
